memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/MAINE.htm#MahautMayennediedafter1162 as of 3/16/2016

GAUTHIER [II] de Mayenne (-in Italy after 18 Dec 1116).  His parentage is confirmed by the charter date …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gauthier IV de Mayenne於1055年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特波奧勒希時，他的父親Geoffroy Ier de Mayenne26歲，母親Mahaut d'Alluyes25歲。他和Alix de Beaugency de Presles至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gauthier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Gauthier IV de Mayenne was born in 1055, in Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, his father, Geoffroy Ier de Mayenne, was 26 and his mother, Mahaut d'Alluyes, was 25. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Alix de Beaugency de Presles.

ko.lifeSummary: Gauthier IV de Mayenne(이)가 1055년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 보겐시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroy Ier de Mayenne(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mahaut d'Alluyes(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Alix de Beaugency de Presles(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gauthier IV de Mayenne родился в 1055 г. в местности бодженси, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroy Ier de Mayenne было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut d'Alluyes, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Alix de Beaugency de Presles.
